headlines.headline: San Antonio visits Minnesota with 2-1 series lead
headlines.description: San Antonio Spurs (62-20, second in the Western Conference) vs. Minnesota Timberwolves (49-33, sixth in the Western Conference)

headlines.headline: Wolves' Chris Finch calls out Tony Brothers for confronting him
headlines.description: Timberwolves coach Chris Finch called it "completely unprofessional behavior" for official Tony Brothers to confront him on two separate occasions during a fourth-quarter stoppage in Game 3.

headlines.headline: Wembanyama matches Olajuwon, Shaq, Kareem with Game 3 stat line
headlines.description: Victor Wembanyama had 39 points, 15 rebounds and more game-wrecking defense for the Spurs, who took a 2-1 series lead with a 115-108 victory over the Timberwolves.

headlines.headline: Where does rookie Jadarian Price fit into Seahawks' backfield?
headlines.description: The rookie becomes a top option with Kenneth Walker III leaving in free agency. But what's Seattle's plan?

headlines.headline: Amon-Ra St. Brown, with full offseason, bullish on Lions' 2026
headlines.description: The Detroit Lions' disappointing 2025 season still doesn't sit well with star receiver Amon-Ra St. Brown.

headlines.headline: Christian McCaffrey, Olivia Culpo reveal they are expecting second child
headlines.description: The San Francisco 49ers star and former Miss Universe announced that they are expecting their second child.

headlines.headline: Key aim for Chargers OC McDaniel: Help QB Herbert 'own the position'
headlines.description: Chargers offensive coordinator Mike McDaniel outlined his plan Friday to reshape the way Justin Herbert plays quarterback.

headlines.headline: Cardinals' Jeremiyah Love signs rookie deal, eager to do 'right by them'
headlines.description: Cardinals RB Jeremiyah Love signed his rookie deal Friday, worth a fully guaranteed $53.9 million over four years with a team option for a fifth season.

headlines.headline: Breece Hall signs contract extension with Jets

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup odds: Eastern Conference favorite Hurricanes look to sweep Flyers
headlines.description: The Avalanche and Hurricanes are the top two favorites to win the 2026 Stanley Cup.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs: How a culture of loyalty built the Wild's success
headlines.description: While some teams see veterans come and go, Minnesota has become a place players don't want to leave.

headlines.headline: Marner, shedding playoff critiques, scores hat trick in win
headlines.description: Mitch Marner, once decried for failures in past postseasons, is turning the narrative around with the Golden Knights after scoring a natural hat trick in a Game 3 win.
